There are national charities that can offer support and information about glaucoma and living with sight loss.
Glaucoma UK Information and support for anyone affected by glaucoma
Website: www.glaucoma.uk Helpline: 01233 64 81 70 forum (Glaucoma UK) support groups (Glaucoma UK) buddy scheme (Glaucoma UK) Royal National Institute of Blind People (RNIB) Information and support for blind and partially sighted people, their families and carers.
Website: www.rnib.org.uk Helpline: 0303 123 9999 sight loss counselling (RNIB) Connect Facebook groups (RNIB)
